heroDescription: Zedi links your ideas and notes with bidirectional links to build a network of knowledge.
feature1Description: Record your thoughts quickly with a Markdown-capable rich editor.
feature2Description: Link easily with [[page name]]. Connect ideas and build a knowledge graph.
feature3Description: Full-text search finds your notes instantly from anywhere.
feature4Description: Local-first design. Works offline and syncs to the cloud automatically.
feature5Description: AI helps organize notes and generate diagrams. Get more from your knowledge.
ctaDescription: Create a free account and build your knowledge base.
